Split remaining commit to separate src/config.py ('add config parser') from tests/test_config.py ('add config tests')
Set bookmark 'feature' to point to 'add config tests' commit
Verify final history matches required state

parts.text: Now I'll split the mixed commit. First, split to isolate `src/utils.py` as "add utility fix":

parts.text: The split failed due to the editor. I'll use a different approach — use `jj new` and `jj squash` to build the history cleanly:

input.command: cd /home/user/mylib && EDITOR=true jj split --revision mtuvvyyk -- src/utils.py 2>&1; jj log --no-pager

input.command: cd /home/user/mylib && jj describe mtuvvyyk --message "add utility fix" && jj describe oxvwumqn --message "add config parser and update tests"
